# skeptic/B1: packet-only for S15-T4-B-E3
import pandas as pd, hashlib
df = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
blob = df.to_csv(index=False).encode()
print(hashlib.sha1(blob).hexdigest()[:8])

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [B1/Skeptic] Skeptic: «loc/iloc, filtros y assign» — «loc etiqueta; iloc posición». Selection by index/column labels is loc, not iloc or values.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Asignación sobre slices que pueden ser view/copy (chained assignment)
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [B1/Skeptic] Skeptic: «chained assignment y copy semantics» ties SettingWithCopyWarning to assigning on a slice that may be view or copy. Not Parquet, openpyxl, or MultiIndex.

[B1/Skeptic] Skeptic: under strings/nullable/coerción the packet points at `pd.to_numeric(..., errors=)` and reporting NaNs from failed conversions. «errors='coerce'» → inválidos a NaN, not delete column or always raise.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Filas, columnas y provenance/hash del artefacto
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [B1/Skeptic] Skeptic: «índices, formatos, provenance y memoria» — a manifest records rows, columns, dtypes, memory_usage and provenance (source, timestamp, hash). Not passwords or real PII.
